LanguageData.SD_CallSpear_Of_Galaxy_Zenith.label: Call Stellar Spear
LanguageData.SD_CallSpear_Of_Galaxy_Zenith.descriptio: Request the Stellar Spear to warp into position above the colony.
LanguageData.SD_ClearFlightPath.label: Clear orbital space
LanguageData.SD_ClearFlightPath.description: Order all allied vessels to withdraw and clear the local orbital space.
LanguageData.SD_Spear_Of_Galaxy_Zenith_Overwatch.desc: Order the Stellar Spear to blockade the system, intercept approaching hostile fleets, and eliminate hostile surface targets.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Minigun_Strafe.label: Stellar Spear: Radiant Crown strafe
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Minigun_Strafe.description: Order the Stellar Spear to strafe the target area with its point-defense batteries.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Cannon_Salvo.label: Stellar Spear: Star-Arc Shatter bombardment
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Cannon_Salvo.description: Order the Stellar Spear to fire a salvo from its light anti-ship batteries into the target area.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Cannon_Surveillance.label: Stellar Spear: Star-Arc Shatter overwatch
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Cannon_Surveillance.descrip: Order the Stellar Spear to watch the target area for 0.3 hours and bombard hostile units entering it.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_EnergyLance_Strafe.label: Stellar Spear: Voidlight strafe
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_EnergyLance_Strafe.descript: Order the Stellar Spear to sweep the target area with its energy lance.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_EnergyLance_Surveillance.de: Order the Stellar Spear to watch the target area for one hour and continuously strike hostile units entering range.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Primary_Cannon_Strafe.label: Stellar Spear: Cosmic Pursuit bombardment
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Primary_Cannon_Strafe.descr: Order the Stellar Spear to sweep a selected line with anti-ship energy torpedoes. The barrage can level mountains, but responds slowly, is imprecise, and requires a long reload.
LanguageData.SD_Firepower_Primary_Cannon_Surveillance: Order the Stellar Spear to watch the target area for three hours and continuously bombard hostile units entering range.
